title: Bulk RNAseq extraction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8tfgr","text":"RNA extraction from frozen brain using Qiagen's RNeasy Lipid Tissue Mini kit.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ahj3m","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ak9l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5idsq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eg2df","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"b21u1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{},"colTitles":["Reagent","Manufacturer","Cat no."],"colWidths":[100,100,100],"data":[["RNeasy Lipid Tissue Mini ","Qiagen","74804"],["Chloroform","Millipore Sigma","C2432"],["Pure Ethanol","Millipore Sigma","E7023"],["Qubit RNA Broad Range kit","Thermo Fisher Scientific ","Q10210"],["TissueRuptor II ","Qiagen","9002755"],["TissueRuptor II  probes","Qiagen","990890"],["RNase Zap","Thermo Fisher Scientific ","AM9780"],["RNase-Free DNase set","Qiagen","79254"]],"guid":"E3E4CBA03D294280808F746A5D222DA3","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["RNeasy Lipid Tissue Mini ","Qiagen","74804"],["Chloroform","Millipore Sigma","C2432"],["Pure Ethanol","Millipore Sigma","E7023"],["Qubit RNA Broad Range kit","Thermo Fisher Scientific ","Q10210"],["TissueRuptor II ","Qiagen","9002755"],["TissueRuptor II  probes","Qiagen","990890"],["RNase Zap","Thermo Fisher Scientific ","AM9780"],["RNase-Free DNase set","Qiagen","79254"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: Manually cut 40-50mg of frozen brain tissue on dry ice. Weigh and place back in -80 °C freezer until ready for extraction. Note: do not let tissue thaw. Keep frozen at all times.
Using the Qiagen RNeasy Lipid Tissue Mini kit, prepare reagents and materials for extraction in a chemical hood. Note: use an RNase free environment and clean with RNase Zap.
Follow extraction steps outlined in Qiagen RNeasy Lipid Tissue Mini kit using the Tissue Ruptor II to homogenize frozen brain tissue.
Using the Qubit RNA Broad Range assay kit, measure the concentration of extracted RNA using 2 µL of sample.
Aliquot desired amount of sample to continue with for sequencing ( >500 ng ) .
Snap freeze each RNA sample with liquid nitrogen and store in -80 °C freezer indefinitely.
Optional: sequence with Illumina's TruSeq stranded riboreduced total RNA at the recommended 50M reads/sample.
Include on column DNase digestion step. Note: keep extracted RNA on wet ice.
creator: Kimberly Paquette
